Updated: Aug. 8, 2025
[ilya sutskever](https://www.listennotes.com/search/?q=%22ilya+sutskever%22&scope=episode "Search more podcast episodes about ilya sutskever") is a computer scientist working in machine learning and currently serving as the Chief scientist of OpenAI.He has made several major contributions to the field of deep learning. He is the co-inventor with Alexander Krizhevsky of AlexNet, a convolutional neural network. He invented Sequence to Sequence Learning, together with Oriol Vinyals and Quoc Le.
